title: Language Generation Path
description: Build fluency in Language Generation inside Evaluation Metrics by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: BIG-Bench
steps.summary: BIG-Bench belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Language Generation. Compare it with MT-Bench and Approximate String Matching. It opens into BIG-bench Lite and BIG-bench Benchmark.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Approximate String Matching
steps.summary: Approximate String Matching belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Language Generation. Start after Matching Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: MT-Bench
steps.summary: MT-Bench belongs to the Evaluation Metrics area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Evaluation Metrics / Language Generation. Compare it with BIG-Bench and Approximate String Matching.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
